Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cana]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — The Royal Palace is located in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Cana is the capital city of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Cana is a capital city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Cana is a location southeast of the current battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Grandmaster Endross wishes to see Cana burn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Cana is a realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The Grandmasters intend to strike at Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Cana is a location that the Damascan army might strike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — An attack on Cana is being planned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Denner and Indirial met Simon in the House and returned with him to Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — The Hanging Tree is located in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Cana is a location containing a royal palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Cana is a city containing a Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — There is no way in or out of Cana because the Incarnation has it sealed up tight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Cana is a location commanded by Talos.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Cana is a city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Cana is the Damascan capital and has been sealed within a barrier of crimson power for six months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Overlord of Cana borrowed some of Feiora's personnel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — The city of Cana is covered by a dome of red light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Rhalia and Cynara fought in the streets of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Incarnations might be gathering in Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Cana's sky is crimson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Cana has a scarlet dome in its sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Cana has gates and massive metal doors set into stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Cana is a location that can be reached via a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Cana is a location ruled by an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Cana is a city that can be sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Simon would have headed to Cana upon learning Indirial was captured.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The camp has been avoiding Cana since its barrier went down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — King Zakareth stands on the walls of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Kai walked onto the walls of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth claims to have been securing the city of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The stone walls of Cana are visible miles away from the tent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Cana has walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — The top of Cana's wall is in ruins.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
